title: lappula rupestris
intro: Lappula rupestris, also known as rock bugloss, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae, commonly found in dry, rocky areas of Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, skin irritations, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of soothing coughs, reducing inflammation, and promoting digestion. Lappula rupestris can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
